message:
test(harness): shadow-mode Ratatui comparison across 10 scenarios (bd-2xj.4, bd-2xj.9)

Add ratatui as dev-dependency and implement shadow-mode comparison tests
that render identical widget scenarios through both FrankenTUI and Ratatui,
comparing output byte-by-byte. 9 tests cover: no-panic rendering, block
identity, nested block identity, structural border matching, text content
preservation, determinism, full comparison report, JSONL schema compliance,
and difference tracking.

10 scenarios: bordered_block, bullet_list, sparkline, table, progress bar,
word-wrap paragraph, tabbed header, nested blocks, styled list, mixed layout.
11/20 comparisons produce identical output; remaining differences are due to
different rendering approaches (sparkline height fill, table column layout,
gauge visual style, word wrap semantics) — not bugs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
